name: RhinoGet
summary: Base class for GetObject, GetPoint, GetSphere, etc. You will never directly create a RhinoGet but you will use its member functions after calling GetObject::GetObjects(), GetPoint::GetPoint(), and so on. Provides tools to set command prompt, set command options, and specify if the "get" can optionally accept numbers, nothing (pressing enter), and undo.

methods.name: Get2dRectangle
methods.signature: public static Result Get2dRectangle(bool solidPen, out Rectangle rectangle, out RhinoView rectView)
methods.summary: Gets a rectangle in view window coordinates.

params.name: solidPen
params.doc: If true, a solid pen is used for drawing while the user selects a rectangle. If false, a dotted pen is used for drawing while the user selects a rectangle.

params.name: rectangle
params.doc: user selected rectangle in window coordinates.

params.name: rectView
params.doc: view that the user selected the window in.

methods.name: GetAngle
methods.signature: public static Result GetAngle(string commandPrompt, Point3d basePoint, Point3d referencePoint, double defaultAngleRadians, out double angleRadians)
methods.summary: Allows user to interactively pick an angle

params.name: commandPrompt
params.doc: if null, a default prompt will be displayed

methods.name: GetArc
methods.signature: public static Result GetArc(out Arc arc)

methods.name: GetBool
methods.signature: public static Result GetBool(string prompt, bool acceptNothing, string offPrompt, string onPrompt, ref bool boolValue)
methods.summary: Easy to use Boolean getter.

params.name: acceptNothing
params.doc: If true, the user can press enter.

params.name: boolValue
params.doc: Default Boolean value set to this and returned here.

returns.doc: The getter result based on user choice. Commands.Result.Success - got value.Commands.Result.Nothing - user pressed enter.Commands.Result.Cancel - user canceled value getting.

methods.name: GetBox(Box)
methods.signature: public static Result GetBox(out Box box)
methods.summary: Asks the user to select a Box in the viewport.

params.name: box
params.doc: If the result is Success, this parameter will be filled out.

methods.name: GetBox(Box, GetBoxMode, Point3d, String, String, String)
methods.signature: public static Result GetBox(out Box box, GetBoxMode mode, Point3d basePoint, string prompt1, string prompt2, string prompt3)
methods.summary: Asks the user to select a Box in the viewport.

params.name: box
params.doc: If the result is Success, this parameter will be filled out.

params.name: mode
params.doc: A particular "get box" mode, or All.

params.name: basePoint
params.doc: Optional base point. Supply Point3d.Unset if you don't want to use this.

params.name: prompt1
params.doc: Optional first prompt. Supply null to use the default prompt.

params.name: prompt2
params.doc: Optional second prompt. Supply null to use the default prompt.

params.name: prompt3
params.doc: Optional third prompt. Supply null to use the default prompt.

methods.name: GetBoxWithCounts
methods.signature: public static Result GetBoxWithCounts(int xMin, ref int xCount, int yMin, ref int yCount, int zMin, ref int zCount, out Point3d[] corners)
methods.summary: Gets a 3d box with prompts for counts in X, Y and Z directions.

params.name: xMin
params.doc: Minimum value allowed for count in the x direction.

params.name: yMin
params.doc: Minimum value allowed for count in the y direction.

params.name: zMin
params.doc: Minimum value allowed for count in the z direction.

params.name: corners
params.doc: corners of the bottom rectangle in counter-clockwise order, followed by top rectangle.

methods.name: GetCircle
methods.signature: public static Result GetCircle(out Circle circle)

methods.name: GetColor
methods.signature: public static Result GetColor(string prompt, bool acceptNothing, ref Color color)
methods.summary: Easy to use color getter.
methods.remarks: If you need options or more advanced user interface, then use GetColor class.

params.name: acceptNothing
params.doc: If true, the user can press enter.

params.name: color
params.doc: Color value returned here. also used as default color.

returns.doc: Commands.Result.Success - got color.Commands.Result.Nothing - user pressed enter.Commands.Result.Cancel - user cancel color getting.

methods.name: GetMeshParameters
methods.signature: public static Result GetMeshParameters(RhinoDoc doc, ref MeshingParameters parameters, ref int uiStyle)
methods.summary: Asks the user to specify meshing parameters.

params.name: parameters
params.doc: The initial meshing parameters. If successful, the updated meshing parameters are returned here.

params.name: uiStyle
params.doc: The user interface style, where: 0 = simple dialog, 1 = details dialog, 2 = script or batch mode.

methods.name: GetMultipleObjects(String, Boolean, ObjectType, ObjRef[])
methods.signature: public static Result GetMultipleObjects(string prompt, bool acceptNothing, ObjectType filter, out ObjRef[] rhObjects)
methods.summary: Easy to use object getter for getting multiple objects.
methods.remarks: If you need options or more advanced user interface, then use GetObject class.

params.name: acceptNothing
params.doc: if true, the user can press enter.

params.name: filter
params.doc: geometry filter to use when getting objects.

params.name: rhObjects
params.doc: result of the get. may be null.

returns.doc: Commands.Result.Success - got object Commands.Result.Nothing - user pressed enter Commands.Result.Cancel - user cancel object getting.

methods.name: GetPoint
methods.signature: public static Result GetPoint(string prompt, bool acceptNothing, out Point3d point)
methods.summary: Gets a point coordinate from the document.
methods.remarks: If you need options or more advanced user interface, then use GetPoint class.

params.name: prompt
params.doc: Prompt to display in command line during the operation.

params.name: acceptNothing
params.doc: if true, the user can press enter.

returns.doc: Commands.Result.Success - got point Commands.Result.Nothing - user pressed enter Commands.Result.Cancel - user cancel point getting.

methods.name: GetPointOnMesh(Guid, String, Boolean, Point3d)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use method that requires document")] public static Result GetPointOnMesh(Guid meshObjectId, string prompt, bool acceptNothing, out Point3d point)
methods.summary: Gets a point constrained to an existing mesh in the document.

params.name: meshObjectId
params.doc: An ID of a mesh in the document.

params.name: acceptNothing
params.doc: true if nothing else should be accepted.

params.name: point
params.doc: A point value will be assigned to this out parameter during this call.

returns.doc: A command result based on user choice.

methods.name: GetPointOnMesh(MeshObject, String, Boolean, Point3d)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use version that takes a document.")] public static Result GetPointOnMesh(MeshObject meshObject, string prompt, bool acceptNothing, out Point3d point)
methods.summary: Gets a point constrained to an existing mesh in the document.

params.name: meshObject
params.doc: An mesh object in the document.

params.name: acceptNothing
params.doc: true if nothing else should be accepted.

params.name: point
params.doc: A point value will be assigned to this out parameter during this call.

returns.doc: The command result based on user choice.

params.name: acceptNothing

params.doc: A point value will be assigned to this out parameter during this call.

methods.name: GetRectangle(Point3d[])
methods.signature: public static Result GetRectangle(out Point3d[] corners)
methods.summary: Gets a 3d rectangle.

params.name: corners
params.doc: corners of the rectangle in counter-clockwise order.

methods.name: GetRectangle(String, Point3d[])
methods.signature: public static Result GetRectangle(string firstPrompt, out Point3d[] corners)
methods.summary: Gets a 3d rectangle.

params.name: corners
params.doc: corners of the rectangle in counter-clockwise order.

methods.name: GetRectangle(GetBoxMode, Point3d, IEnumerable<String>, Point3d[])
methods.signature: public static Result GetRectangle(GetBoxMode mode, Point3d firstPoint, IEnumerable<string> prompts, out Point3d[] corners)
methods.summary: Gets a 3d rectangle made up of four points.

params.name: firstPoint
params.doc: The first corner used. Pass Point3d.Unset if you do not want to set this.

params.name: prompts
params.doc: Optional prompts to display while getting points. May be null.

params.name: corners
params.doc: Corners of the rectangle in counter-clockwise order will be assigned to this out parameter during this call.

methods.name: GetRectangleWithCounts
methods.signature: public static Result GetRectangleWithCounts(int xMin, ref int xCount, int yMin, ref int yCount, out Point3d[] corners)
methods.summary: Gets a 3d rectangle with prompts for counts in X and Y directions.

params.name: xMin
params.doc: Minimum value allowed for count in the x direction.

params.name: yMin
params.doc: Minimum value allowed for count in the y direction.

params.name: corners
params.doc: corners of the rectangle in counter-clockwise order.

methods.signature: public static Result GetSpiral(out NurbsCurve spiral)

methods.name: GetString
methods.signature: public static Result GetString(string prompt, bool acceptNothing, ref string outputString)
methods.summary: Easy to use string getter.
methods.remarks: If you need options or more advanced user interface, then use GetString class.

params.name: acceptNothing
params.doc: if true, the user can press enter.

params.name: outputString
params.doc: default string set to this value and string value returned here.

returns.doc: Commands.Result.Success - got string Commands.Result.Nothing - user pressed enter Commands.Result.Cancel - user cancel string getting.

methods.name: GetView
methods.signature: public static Result GetView(string commandPrompt, out RhinoView view)
methods.summary: Allows the user to interactively pick a viewport.

params.name: commandPrompt
params.doc: The command prompt during the request.

params.name: view
params.doc: The view that the user picked. If the operation is successful, then this out parameter is assigned the correct view during this call.

returns.doc: The result based on user choice.

methods.name: InGet
methods.signature: public static bool InGet(RhinoDoc doc)
methods.summary: Returns true if the document is current in a "Get" operation.

returns.doc: true if a getter is currently active.

methods.name: InGetObject
methods.signature: public static bool InGetObject(RhinoDoc doc)
methods.summary: Returns true if currently in a GetObject.GetObjects()

methods.name: InGetPoint
methods.signature: public static bool InGetPoint(RhinoDoc doc)
methods.summary: Returns true if currently in a GetPoint.Get()

methods.name: StringToCommandOptionName(String)
methods.signature: public static string StringToCommandOptionName(string stringToConvert)
methods.summary: Convert some arbitrary string value to a valid command option name removing any invalid characters.

returns.doc: Returns null if the string is null or empty or if it contains nothing but invalid characters. If the converted string is one or more characters in length then the converted value is returned.

methods.name: StringToCommandOptionName(String, String)
methods.signature: public static LocalizeStringPair StringToCommandOptionName(string englishString, string localizedString)
methods.summary: Convert some arbitrary string value to a valid command option name removing any invalid characters.

returns.doc: Returns null if the strings are null or empty or if they contain nothing but invalid characters. If the converted string is one or more characters in length then a LocalizeStringPair is returned characters the converted string values. If the localized string is null or empty then the English string is used as the localized value.
